steps.title: Put both equations in matching form
steps.content: Rewrite the first equation as $5r-pw=-8$. Rewrite the second as $5r-8w=13$. For the system to have no solution, the $r$- and $w$-coefficients must match proportionally, while the constants are different.

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content: The $r$-coefficients are both $5$, so the scale factor is $1$. Therefore the $w$-coefficients must match: $-p=-8$, so $p=8$.

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: With $p=8$, the equations have the same left side, $5r-8w$, but different constants, $-8$ and $13$. That creates parallel distinct lines, so the system has no solution. The answer is 8.
